# Interlock Control Logic Technical Handover Document: Transferring Control Philosophy, Logic Description, and Interface Specifications to the Operations Team

## 适用受众
Subcontractor

## 写作角度说明
互锁控制逻辑技术交接文档是电气分包商在完成互锁控制系统安装和配置后，向业主运维团队正式移交的技术文档。该文档需要清晰说明互锁控制原理、逻辑描述、接口定义和操作说明，确保运维团队能够正确理解和操作互锁系统。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Handing over interlock documentation that describes the logic using ladder diagram notation — without providing a plain-language control philosophy description — means the facilities manager can never independently review and approve the logic without electrical engineering support.

## 参考素材
- Handover document structure: control philosophy description (plain language) → interlock logic description (state transition diagram) → input/output list → alarm and trip logic → interface specifications → operator interface description → maintenance guidance
- Control philosophy: describe the overall operation in plain language, e.g., "The interlock system prevents both doors of an airlock from being open simultaneously to maintain pressure differential. Door B can only be unlocked when Door A is fully closed and sealed."
- Input/output list: table format with signal name → signal type (DI/DO/AI/AO) → signal description → terminal address → normal state → alarm state
- Alarm logic description: list all alarms with priority level, trigger condition, consequence (what the system does when alarm activates), acknowledgment procedure, reset procedure
- As-built wiring diagram: single-line diagram → loop diagrams for each interlock circuit → terminal connection diagram → cable schedule
- Training requirement: provide on-site handover training session (minimum 2 hours) to facilities manager and maintenance staff → document training attendance → provide Q&A session notes

## 关键词
Interlock Handover, Control Logic, Control Philosophy, I/O List, Technical Handover, Wiring Diagram
